title.ja: 中国からアフリカへのファスナー輸出：完全な出荷と税関ガイド2026

title.hi: चीन से अफ्रीका को फास्टनर निर्यात: पूर्ण शिपिंग और सीमा शुल्क गाइड 2026

description.en: Complete guide to exporting fasteners from China to Africa. Shipping routes, transit times, customs procedures, documentation requirements, and landed cost calculation for African importers.
description.zh: 从中国向非洲出口紧固件的完整指南。航运路线、运输时间、清关程序、文件要求和非洲进口商的到岸成本计算。
description.es: Guía completa para exportar sujetadores de China a África. Rutas de envío, tiempos de tránsito, procedimientos aduaneros, requisitos de documentación y cálculo de costo-landed para importadores africanos.
description.ar: دليل شامل لتصدير المثبتات من الصين إلى أفريقيا. طرق الشحن وأوقات العبور وإجراءات الجمارك ومتطلبات التوثيق وحساب التكلفة المستلمة للمستوردين الأفارقة.
description.fr: Guide complet pour exporter des fixations de Chine vers l'Afrique. Itinéraires maritimes, délais de transit, procédures douanières, exigences documentaires et calcul du coût débarqué pour importateurs africains.
description.pt: Guia completo para exportar fixadores da China para África. Rotas de envio, tempos de trânsito, procedimentos aduaneiros, requisitos de documentação e cálculo de custo CIF para importadores africanos.
description.ru: Полное руководство по экспорту крепежа из Китая в Африку. Маршруты доставки, сроки транзита, таможенные процедуры, требования к документации и расчет стоимости доставки для африканских импортеров.
description.ja: 中国からアフリカへのファスナー輸出の完全ガイド。配送ルート、輸送時間、税関手続き、書類要件、アフリカ輸入業者向けの CIF コスト計算。
description.de: Vollständiger Leitfaden für Fastener Export aus China nach Afrika. Versandrouten, Transitzeiten, Zollverfahren, Dokumentationsanforderungen und Lieferkostenberechnung für afrikanische Importeure.
description.hi: चीन से अफ्रीका को फास्टनर निर्यात करने के लिए पूर्ण गाइड। शिपिंग मार्ग, ट्रांजिट समय, सीमा शुल्क प्रक्रियाएं, दस्तावेज़ आवश्यकताएं, और अफ्रीकी आयातकों के लिए लैंडेड कॉस्ट गणना।

keywords: export fasteners China Africa, shipping fasteners to Africa, customs clearance Africa, landed cost calculation, freight forwarding China

heading.en: Major Shipping Routes from China to Africa

body.en:
Key shipping routes for fastener exports from China to Africa:

Route 1: Shanghai/Ningbo → Durban (South Africa)
- Transit time: 20-25 days
- Frequency: Weekly sailings
- Major carriers: Maersk, MSC, CMA CGM

Route 2: Shanghai/Ningbo → Lagos/Apapa (Nigeria)
- Transit time: 28-35 days
- Frequency: Bi-weekly sailings
- Note: Nigerian port congestion can add 7-14 days

Route 3: Shanghai/Ningbo → Mombasa (Kenya)
- Transit time: 18-22 days
- Frequency: Weekly sailings
- Serves Kenya, Uganda, Rwanda, Burundi, South Sudan

Route 4: Shanghai/Ningbo → Dar es Salaam (Tanzania)
- Transit time: 20-25 days
- Frequency: Weekly sailings
- Serves Tanzania, Zambia, Malawi, DRC

Route 5: Shanghai/Ningbo → Djibouti → Addis Ababa (Ethiopia)
- Transit time: 18-22 days to Djibouti
- Overland: 2-3 days by truck

Maximize container utilization for fastener shipments:

20ft Container:
- Capacity: 20-25 metric tons
- Volume: 28-33 cubic meters
- Typical load: 800-1200 boxes (varies by product)
- Gross weight limit: 21,770 kg

40ft Container:
- Capacity: 40-45 metric tons
- Volume: 58-68 cubic meters
- Typical load: 1600-2400 boxes
- Gross weight limit: 26,780 kg

Palletization: Use standard 1140x1140mm pallets for optimal container fill. Sea-worthy packaging with moisture barriers essential for tropical conditions.

TradeGo provides sea-worthy packaging as standard, including:
- Reinforced cartons (edge protectors)
- Plastic lining for moisture protection
- Desiccant packs for containerized shipping
- Proper palletization for forklift loading

Standard documentation for China to Africa fastener shipments:

Export Documents (from China):
1. Commercial Invoice (detailed itemized)
2. Packing List
3. Bill of Lading (B/L) - Sea waybill or original B/L
4. Certificate of Origin (Form E for Africa trade agreements)
5. Fumigation Certificate (if wood packaging used)
6. Container Security Seal (CSS) certificate
7. Mill Test Certificates (EN 10204 3.1 or 3.2)
8. Export Declaration

Import Documents (into Africa):
1. Import Declaration
2. Bill of Entry
3. Import License (if required)
4. SONCAP (Nigeria) or equivalent
5. SABS Certificate of Conformity (South Africa)
6. Tax Identification Number (TIN)
7. Importer's Declaration

Key customs procedures for major African import markets:

South Africa:
- Customs duty: 10% on fasteners (Chapter 73)
- VAT: 15%
- SABS compliance required for certain products
- eFiling system for customs declarations

Nigeria:
- Customs duty: 10-20% depending on product
- SONCAP: Mandatory product certification
- CERSAI registration required
- Apapa port congestion is significant issue

Kenya:
- Customs duty: 10-25% (EAC common external tariff)
- VAT: 16%
- KEBS compliance required
- Single customs declaration system

Tanzania:
- Customs duty: 10-25%
- VAT: 18%
- TFDA/TBS compliance for standards

General Tip: Use experienced customs clearing agents familiar with fastener imports.

Example: M20 hex bolts to Durban, South Africa

FOB Value: $1,200/MT (20 MT order = $24,000)
Ocean Freight: $1,400/20ft container = $70/MT
Insurance: $12/MT (1% of CIF)
CIF Value: $1,282/MT

Customs Duty (10%): $128/MT
VAT (15% on CIF+Duty): $212/MT
Port Handling: $50/MT
Clearing Agent: $30/MT
Inland Transport: $60/MT

Total Landed Cost: $1,762/MT

Local SA Price (equivalent): $2,300-2,500/MT
Savings: $540-740/MT (22-30%)

Total Order Savings: $10,800-14,800 for 20 MT order
